name: Epilogue Fusion (CUDA)
trigger: GEMM followed by bias add and activation, matmul + relu, conv + bias + activation, epilogue fusion
approach: Fuse post-GEMM/Conv operations (bias add, ReLU, GELU, sigmoid, scaling) into the output loop of the main kernel. Eliminates intermediate memory writes. Use CUTLASS epilogue visitor pattern or custom inline epilogue in CUDA.

evidence.strategy: Switch to warp-level shuffle reduction and shared memory tiling.
Switch to algorithmic change with fused operations and shared memory tiling.
Investigate deep integration with hardware-native operations and architecture-specific instructions.
refine asynchronous TMA transfers and overlapping computation with advanced memory prefetching.
Redesign parallel execution axis to eliminate synchronization overhead and buffer redundancies.
